summary: A USCIS Alien Registration Requirement public service announcement ('Stay on the right side of the law'), using branded title cards and stock B-roll (a small-town street, hands typing on a laptop) under an instructional voiceover explaining who must register and who is exempt. It carries no music track. On-screen text reads 'ARR Alien Registration Requirement', 'Registering with USCIS ensures', 'You don't have to register', and 'FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION'.
notable_text: ARR Alien Registration Requirement; Registering with USCIS ensures; You don't have to register; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
